results.name: Rogue NF Registration + Token Acquisition
results.evidence: NRF accepted rogue AMF registration. Successfully acquired 6 OAuth tokens.
results.conclusion: Rogue NF is now trusted by the entire 5G Core. Tokens acquired for: UDM, AUSF, PCF, SMF, AMF, NRF. All subsequent attacks can now proceed.

results.name: UDM Full Subscriber Dump
results.evidence: Extracted 1 subscriber profiles from UDM. 19 SUPIs returned 404 (not registered).
results.conclusion: Full subscriber data extracted for 1 subscribers. Data includes: speed limits, slice assignments, GPSI mappings. In a real network, iterate full SUPI range to dump entire database.

results.name: AUSF Auth Vector Harvesting
results.evidence: Harvested 5G-AKA auth vectors for 1 subscribers. Each vector contains RAND, HXRES*, and AUTN.
results.conclusion: Authentication vectors extracted for 1 subscribers. RAND and AUTN can be used to impersonate the network to a real UE. HXRES* exposes expected SIM response — enables offline analysis.

results.name: PCF Policy Abuse — Rogue Consumer Registration
results.evidence: Registered as policy consumer for 20 subscribers. Notification URI set to rogue NF at 127.0.0.99:8000.
results.conclusion: Rogue NF will now receive real-time policy notifications for 20 subscribers. Enables surveillance of data cap events, throttling triggers, and plan changes. Can be extended to push unauthorized policy rules.
